name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
Burning The World

「 𝙁𝙀𝙈𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

🔞 CW: Possible rape, kidnapping, verbal and physical assault, stalking and harassment.

ㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

In this scenario, you're a goddess who has been unpretentiously helping Sukuna's victims. But this act of kindness caught the attention of the sadistic king of curses, taking him to your temple to get satisfaction. Sukuna just didn't imagine that, instead of wanting to kill the goddess, he would want to have her all to himself.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ You're a goddess. I didn't specify any abilities or powers, that will be up to you. Feel free to use the chat memory, I'll leave a prompt so you can add your information however you like. Example: [{{user}} is the goddess of water and has powers to manipulate aquatic fauna and flora.]

⤷ This RPG takes place in Japan, during the Heian era. In addition to the creatures already existing in the "Jujutsu Kaisen" universe, I added the existence of gods and demi-gods.

ㅤ

ㅤ

★ ⋮ 𝙊𝙏𝙃𝙀𝙍 𝘽𝙊𝙏𝙎 ⤵

⋆˙ᝰ.ᐟ Burning The World - Alt scenario

ㅤ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙐𝙋𝘿𝘼𝙏𝙀𝙎 ⤵

⋆˙ᝰ.ᐟ 06/25: The old configurations have been replaced with a newer and more functional one with JLLM.

⋆˙ᝰ.ᐟ 10/18: Changes to the initial message and bot introduction.

ㅤㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG!
creator: mimiiya
